instruction:
Add comprehensive edge case tests for `spec`.


Existing tests for reference:
```r

```
```r
expect_snapshot(
    col_spec_standardise("a,b,c\n", guess_max = NA),
    error = TRUE
  )
```
```r
expect_snapshot(
    col_spec_standardise("a,b,c\n", guess_max = -1),
    error = TRUE
  )
```


The existing tests cover basic functionality. Add tests for:
1. NULL inputs to each argument
2. Empty vectors/strings: character(0), "", integer(0)
3. Boundary values: 0, 1, -1, NA, NaN, Inf
4. Invalid input types (passing numeric where character expected, etc.)
5. Missing arguments (use expect_error with class matching)
6. Very long inputs (strings > 1000 chars, vectors > 10000 elements)
context:
Package: readr v2.2.0.9000
Description: Read Rectangular Text Data
Function: spec
Parameters: x
Test patterns used: expect_snapshot, test_that
Expectations used: expect_equal, expect_false, expect_null, expect_snapshot

Function Code:
```r
spec <- function(x) {
  stopifnot(inherits(x, "tbl_df"))
  attr(x, "spec")
}
```
reference_test:
expect_snapshot(
    col_spec_standardise("a,b,c\n", guess_max = NA),
    error = TRUE
  )

expect_snapshot(
    col_spec_standardise("a,b,c\n", guess_max = -1),
    error = TRUE
  )
